sections.paragraph:
m.-

(1) darkness, Gen 1:2, seq.; Exo 10:21, 22 Exo 10:22, etc.; hence spoken of a dark place, as of Hades, Psa 88:13 compare Job 10:21 of an underground prison, Isa 42:7 47:5 49:9 . אֹוצְרֹות חשֶׁךְ treasures of darkness; i.e. hid in darkness, in underground cells, Isa 45:3.

(2) metaph.-(a) misery, adversity. Isa 9:1 Job 15:22, לֹא יַאֲמִין שׁוּב מִנִּי חשֶׁךְ “he does not hope to return out of darkness (or destruction);” 23 Job 15:23, 30 Job 15:30 20:26 23:17 Mic 7:8 Amo 5:18, 20 Psa 18:29. Also used of death, Ecc 11:8 compare אֹור used of life, verse Ecc 11:7.-(b) ignorance, Job 37:19 (comp. 12:15 , and there verse 24 Job 37:24).-(c) sadness, Ecc 5:16.-[“(d) wickedness, Pro 2:13 comp. τὸ σκότος, Joh 3:19 also Rom 13:12.”]
